3024976.title: Digital romance
3024976.description: In Brutal Bullet, a computer game, our hero Kane Skullhead lives by 'shoot first, ask later'. When a virus infects the computer's binary system, Kane finds a new, deadly antagonist in the antivirus threatening to take away his beating heart.
